input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8771 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The observed failure is an API drift issue: ArtifactResolutionException and ArtifactNotFoundException constructor signatures changed between 2.0.6 and 2.0.7, so tests must be updated to compile against 2.0.7.

Full Maven CLI build execution may read user settings/local repository and attempt artifact or plugin resolution; generated tests should avoid network-dependent Maven goals unless they isolate local repository/settings in test code.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra deterministic setup is needed. The resolved maven-core 2.0.7 artifact brings its Maven, Plexus, ClassWorlds, Wagon, and related runtime dependencies transitively, and meaningful coverage is reachable through in-process Maven core APIs and CLI/version/diagnostic paths without Docker, additional Maven dependencies, or required environment/system properties.
